rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg001
rows.name:
I went to the capital on business
the other day, and saw someone built
just like Meknes from behind.

rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg002
rows.name:
Of course, it wasn't him at all.
Just an Iiran woman I didn't know...
That reality left me dejected.

rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg003
rows.name:
I ended up hurling terrible
words at that woman, though
she had done nothing wrong.

rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg004
rows.name:
I can still remember the look
of shock on her face - there
were tears in her eyes.

rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg005
rows.name:
How could I be so thoughtless...? She
was only trying to be kind, and to a
strange Superbian soldier no less...

rows.label: tlk70000075_04_msg006
rows.name:
I have to find her again and
apologize. It's the least I can do.
